title: Crispy American Chicken Bowl
description: A kidfriendly, light American bowl featuring sweetspicy gochujangmarinated chicken, crunchy veggies, and fluffy brown rice for a satisfying, Mediterraneanfriendly meal.
instructions: Preheat air fryer to 200 °C (400 °F) for 3 minutes.
Whisk gochujang, honey, soy sauce, minced garlic, grated ginger, olive oil, salt, and pepper to make a glaze.
Pat chicken dry and toss in the glaze until fully coated; let marinate for 10–15 minutes.
Place chicken in the air‑fryer basket and cook for 15–18 minutes, flipping halfway, until internal temperature reaches 75 °C (165 °F).
Reheat cooked brown rice in the microwave for 1 minute or on the stovetop until warm.
Assemble the bowl by layering rice, air‑fried chicken, sliced cucumber, and shredded carrots.
Drizzle any remaining glaze over the bowl.
Garnish with fresh cilantro or parsley if desired.
Serve immediately for the best texture and flavor.
